sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int64, value String);
UPDATE test_table SET value = toInt64OrDefault(value, CAST('0', 'Int64')) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, toInt64OrDefault(value, CAST('-1', 'Int64')) AS converted_value FROM test_table;
SELECT id, toInt64OrDefault(value, CAST('100', 'Int64')) AS converted_value FROM test_table WHERE id IN (1, 2);
